questionText: Provide a breakdown by country/area of your electricity/heat/steam/cooling consumption in the reporting year.
questionKo: 문항 7.7에 보고한 시장기반 Scope 2 온실가스 배출량에서, 탈탄소 또는 저탄소 에너지원(Zero or near-zero emission factor)을 통해 생산된 전력, 열, 스팀 및/또는 냉방과 관련된 세부 정보를 입력하십시오.
sectorTags: Financial services, Oil & Gas, Coal, General, Aviation, Capital goods, Transport OEMS - EPM, Chemicals, Metals & mining, Transport services, Steel, Agricultural commodities, Transport OEMS, Energy utilities & power generators, Cement, Food, beverage & tobacco, Paper & forestry, Real estate, Construction
simpleHelp: Breaking down energy consumption to the country/area level is useful to data users, as this is often the level at which energy-related legislation is introduced. Data from this question can help guide the development of energy-related legislation.

rows.title: China, Hong Kong Special Administrative Region
rows.titleKo: China, Hong Kong Special Administrative Region

rows.title: Saint Helena, Ascension and Tristan da Cunha
rows.titleKo: Saint Helena, Ascension 및 Tristan da Cunha

rows.title: South Georgia and the South Sandwich Islands
rows.titleKo: South Georgia 및 the South Sandwich Islands

columns.text: Consumption of purchased heat, steam, and cooling (MWh)
Consumption of self-generated heat, steam, and cooling (MWh)

columns.textKo: 선택한 조달방법을 통한 보고연도 저탄소 에너지 소비량(MWh)

guidance.text:
Country/area (column 0) 
Organizations will see a row for each country/area they have selected in question 1.7.
You should include consumption from both purchased/acquired energy and self-generated energy in this question. Energy that is purchased but not physically consumed (e.g. traded power, financial instruments), or energy that is self-generated but not physically consumed, should not be included here.
Energy consumption figures should be for the reporting year only (as defined by your answer to 1.4).
If you are a member of the RE100 initiative, the loads that your organization may have chosen to exclude from the boundary of its RE100 target under the RE100 materiality threshold provisions (see Section Six: Additional provisions in the RE100 technical criteria ) must still be reported in this question, using column 3 to identify where the materiality threshold provisions have been applied.
Consumption of purchased electricity (MWh) (column 1) 
Enter in megawatt hours (MWh) the total amount of purchased electricity consumed by your organization in the selected country/area in the reporting year.
Consumption of self-generated electricity (MWh) (column 2) 
Enter in megawatt hours (MWh) the total amount of self-generated electricity consumed by your organization in the selected country/area in the reporting year.
If your organization has self-generated and consumed electricity using Combined Heat and Power (CHP), this electricity consumption should be included here.
Is some or all of this consumption excluded from your RE100 commitment? (column 3) 
This column only appears to RE100 companies.
Select "Yes" if you are excluding some or all of the electricity consumption reported in 
both column 1 and column 2.
This column must only be used to describe where your organization is exempting consumption in particular countries or areas from the boundary of its RE100 target as allowed under the RE100 materiality threshold provisions (see Section Six: Additional provisions in the RE100 technical criteria ).
Consumption of purchased heat, steam, and cooling (MWh) (column 4) 
Enter in megawatt hours (MWh) the total amount of purchased heat, steam, and cooling consumed by your company in the selected country/area in the reporting year.
You should only account for heat generated in transferable mediums, i.e. the forms of heat that may also be purchased or acquired from third parties (as listed in question 7.30.1).
Consumption of self-generated heat, steam, and cooling (MWh) (column 5) 
Enter in megawatt hours (MWh) the total amount of heat, steam, and cooling self-generated and consumed by your organization in the selected country/area in the reporting year.
This column should be used to report your organizations consumption of self-generated heat, steam, and cooling generated from Combined Heat and Power (CHP).
Total electricity/heat/steam/cooling energy consumption (MWh) (column 6) 
This column will be auto-calculated from columns 1, 2, 4 and 5. 
Ensure you have entered data into these columns. 
Provide details of the electricity consumption excluded (column 7) 
Specify whether you are excluding the entire electricity consumption reported in columns 1 and 2, or just part.
If you are not excluding the entire consumption, explain what is being excluded.
If you do not specify, RE100 will assume you are reporting an exclusion of the entire consumption reported in column 2 and column 3.
guidance.textKo: Country/area (열 0) Organizations will see a 행 for each country/area they have 선택 in 문항 1.7. You 해야 합니다 include consumption from both purchased/acquired energy 및 self-generated energy in this 문항. Energy that is purchased but not physically consumed (e.g. traded power, financial instruments), 또는 energy that is self-generated but not physically consumed, 해야 합니다 not be included here. 에너지 소비량 figures 해야 합니다 be 에 대한 보고연도 only (as defined by your answer to 1.4). 만약 you are a member 의 RE100 이니셔티브, the loads that 귀사 may have chosen to exclude from the boundary of its RE100 목표 under the RE100 materiality threshold provisions (see Section Six: Additional provisions in the RE100 technical 기준) 해야 합니다 still be 보고 in this 문항, using 열 3 to identify 여기서 the materiality threshold provisions have been applied. 저탄소 에너지 소비 국가/지역 (열 1) Enter in megawatt hours (MWh) the total amount of purchased electricity consumed by 귀사 in the 선택 country/area in the 보고연도. 조달 방법 (Sourcing method) (열 2) Enter in megawatt hours (MWh) the total amount of self-generated electricity consumed by 귀사 in the 선택 country/area in the 보고연도. 만약 귀사 has self-generated 및 consumed electricity using Combined Heat 및 Power (CHP), this 전력 소비량 해야 합니다 be included here. Is some 또는 all of this consumption excluded from your RE100 commitment? (열 3) This 열 only appears to RE100 companies. Select "Yes" 만약 you are 제외 some 또는 all 의 전력 소비량 보고 in both 열 1 및 열 2. This 열 해야 합니다 only be used to 설명 여기서 귀사 is exempting consumption in particular countries 또는 areas from the boundary of its RE100 목표 as allowed under the RE100 materiality threshold provisions (see Section Six: Additional provisions in the RE100 technical 기준). Consumption of purchased heat, steam, 및 cooling (MWh) (열 4) Enter in megawatt hours (MWh) the total amount of purchased heat, steam, 및 cooling consumed by your company in the 선택 country/area in the 보고연도. You 해야 합니다 only account for heat generated in transferable mediums, i.e. the forms of heat that may also be purchased 또는 acquired from third parties (as listed in 문항 7.30.1). Consumption of self-generated heat, steam, 및 cooling (MWh) (열 5) Enter in megawatt hours (MWh) the total amount of heat, steam, 및 cooling self-generated 및 consumed by 귀사 in the 선택 country/area in the 보고연도. This 열 해야 합니다 be used to report 귀사s consumption of self-generated heat, steam, 및 cooling generated from Combined Heat 및 Power (CHP). Total electricity/heat/steam/cooling 에너지 소비량 (MWh) (열 6) This 열 will be auto-calculated from 열 1, 2, 4 및 5. Ensure you have entered data into these 열. 세부 정보를 입력 의 전력 소비량 excluded (열 7) Specify whether you are 제외 the entire 전력 소비량 보고 in 열 1 및 2, 또는 just part. 만약 you are not 제외 the entire consumption, explain what is being excluded. 만약 you do not specify, RE100 will assume you are reporting an exclusion 의 entire consumption 보고 in 열 2 및 열 3.

criteria.criteria:
Points will be awarded per completed cell in proportion to the number of cells displayed (excluding columns 'Total electricity/heat/steam/cooling energy consumption (MWh)' AND 'Is some or all of this electricity consumption excluded from your RE100 commitment?' AND 'Provide details of the electricity consumption excluded').
A maximum of 3/3 points is available for this question.
criteria.criteriaKo: 점수가 부여됩니다 per 완성된 칸(셀) in proportion to the number of 표시된 칸(셀) (제외 열 'Total electricity/heat/steam/cooling 에너지 소비량 (MWh)' 그리고 'Is some 또는 all of this 전력 소비량 excluded from your RE100 commitment?' 그리고 '세부 정보를 입력 의 전력 소비량 excluded'). 이 문항에서 획득 가능한 최고점은 3/3점입니다.

Table completed excluding all of the following columns - 1 point
- 'Total electricity/heat/steam/cooling energy consumption (MWh)'
- 'Is some or all of this electricity consumption excluded from your RE100 commitment?'
- 'Provide details of the electricity consumption excluded'
A maximum of 1/1 point is available for this question.

change.question_ko: 7.7 에서 보고된 시장 기반 Scope 2 수치에서 배출 계수가 0 또는 거의 0 에 가까운 전기 , 열 , 증기 및 / 또는 냉방량에 대한 세부 정보를 제공하십시오 . (2) M7. Environmental Performance - Climate Change
change.q2025_text: Provide a breakdown by country/area of your electricity/heat/steam/cooling consumption in the reporting year.
change.detail_change_types: Change to question order/number, New row, Modified row text
change.change_summary: New dropdown option "Kosovo" and several minor edits to country/area names.
change.scoring_change_summary: CC All sectors Disclosure, Awareness, Management & Leadership • Scoring updated to algin with scoring previously in question

2026 question text applied
2026 response type/columns applied
2026 D/A/M/L point allocation linked
2026 scoring criteria linked
2025-to-2026 change summary linked
change.detail_change_typesKo: 문항 순서/번호 변경, 신규 행, 행 문구 수정
change.change_summaryKo: 신규 드롭다운 선택지 "Kosovo" 및 several minor edits to country/area names.
change.scoring_change_summaryKo: CC 전 섹터 공시, 인지, 관리 & 리더십 • Scoring updated to algin with scoring previously in 문항

sourceInfo.name: CDP Full Corporate Questionnaire and Reporting Guidance 2026

sourceInfo.name: CDP Climate Change Scoring Essential Criteria 2026

sectorTagsKo: 금융 서비스, 석유 및 가스, 석탄, 일반, 항공, 자본재, 운송 OEM - EPM, 화학, 금속 및 광업, 운송 서비스, 철강, 농산물 원자재, 운송 OEM, 에너지 유틸리티 및 발전, 시멘트, Food, beverage & tobacco, 제지 및 임업, 부동산, 건설
simpleHelpKo: Breaking down 에너지 소비량 to the country/area level is useful to 데이터 사용자, as this is often the level at which energy-related legislation is introduced. Data from this 문항 can help guide the development of energy-related legislation.
